SQLLite.SQL: select to_number(r.ID) "REPORT_ID", r.document_id "DOCUMENT_ID", to_char(r.parameters) "PARAM_XML", r.print_details "PRINT_XML", r.status "STATUS", r.error_message "ERROR_MESSAGE", r.print_status "PRINT_STATUS", r.reference "REFERENCE", r.created_date "CREATE_DATE" from report_queue r where to_number(r.ID) = ${param.reportId} and r.document_id is not null order by to_number(r.ID) DESC

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper edsAdmin cpSuper
